title: Serious Rei Naked Child Pornography
wikitext:
[]: Serious - Rei Naked - Child Pornography Post by Radical Lanzar » Sat Feb 18, 2012 6:56 am Seriously. [Edit] I'm aware that more should be stated on the matter, but it really isn't necessary. Eva goes into explicit detail compared to most anime, beyond mere fan service. Last I checked Japan had some laws about pubic hair and minors, but I still think this would cross the line. More importantly I'm wondering about imports and US laws clashing.

[]: Post by Final Messenger » Sat Feb 18, 2012 8:14 am I am pretty sure that it is not. First the legal age for consent in Japan is 14 IIRC. Also if it was considered to be child pornography I don’t think it would get a North American release. More over there are thousands of Eva doujins in Japan which have Rei and the others having sex with each other, I am not one hundred percent sure what the rules are over there but doujins sell over there and to my knowledge people don’t get arrested for their purchase. As for importing what do you mean, doujins? Also we see Rei’s pubs? I don’t remember that the most we see in EoE IIRC was her boobs and a shot of her behind.

[]: Post by Dream » Sat Feb 18, 2012 8:48 am I think you're referring to NGE and EoE proper instead of Doujins, right? In that case i think it is extremely easy to argue and back up Evangelion's artistic properties, so even if there was a 14 year old naked and some people would be complaining about it, i don't think they're going to ban it or anything .

[]: Post by BiQ » Sat Feb 18, 2012 10:32 am Disclaimer: IANAL. In most places of the world (including U.S., IIRC), drawn imaginary characters are not considered "children" who are in need to be protected from exploitation. I hear there was a case in Canada, though, where a man was sentenced to jail for possessing CP images that were essentially simpsons porn. However, I also remember the case involved CP photos of real children too. I also think Sweden passed a law that basically extended the definition of "sexually explicit material involving minors" to drawn stuff. I might be wrong, though. Also, nudity does not automatically equal porn.

[]: Post by r0ach » Sat Feb 18, 2012 12:17 pm Since it is a drawn image, and not a real 14 year old girl, whom can consent in Japan anyway, it does not need/get the protection of a real minor. Also, given the context in which the nudity is portrayed, most people would not be ethically opposed to it; unless they were genuinely looking for something to gripe about. It's Eva, and most of the fans/casual anime fans can easily show that the nudity in the show is not abused, and more to the point, not all that sexual in the first place. From what I understand, there are many ways around child protection laws, when it is an animated or drawn property. I think it protects the artist's property or something; even if is clearly a child in a sexual situation. As said though, that's not the case with Eva too much.

[]: Post by drinian » Sat Feb 18, 2012 12:53 pm If you would like to discuss the legal issues, this thread would be more appropriate. This is not an Evangelion issue. Also, you may have noticed that hundreds of thousands, if not millions, of copies of Evangelion have been licensed and released in the United States over a a period of fifteen years. So... really?
